result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 8:     AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 mo...
                              ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH base_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) AS owner_assignment_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT bc.*
  FROM base_cases bc
  LEFT JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = bc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.owner_assignment_count, 0) <= 1
), per_agent AS (
  SELECT owner_id,
         COUNT(*) AS case_count,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred_cases
  GROUP BY owner_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT owner_id AS "Id"
FROM per_agent
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH base_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) AS owner_assignment_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT bc.*
  FROM base_cases bc
  LEFT JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = bc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.owner_assignment_count, 0) <= 1
), per_agent AS (
  SELECT owner_id,
         COUNT(*) AS case_count,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred_cases
  GROUP BY owner_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT owner_id AS "Id"
FROM per_agent
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH base_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) AS owner_assignment_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT bc.*
  FROM base_cases bc
  LEFT JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = bc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.owner_assignment_count, 0) <= 1
), per_agent AS (
  SELECT owner_id,
         COUNT(*) AS case_count,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred_cases
  GROUP BY owner_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT owner_id AS "Id"
FROM per_agent
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH base_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) AS owner_assignment_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT bc.case_id, bc.owner_id, bc.created_ts, bc.closed_ts
  FROM base_cases bc
  LEFT JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = bc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.owner_assignment_count, 0) <= 1
), per_agent AS (
  SELECT owner_id,
         COUNT(*) AS case_count,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_ts - created_ts))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred_cases
  GROUP BY owner_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT owner_id AS "Id"
FROM per_agent
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH base_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) AS owner_assignment_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT bc.case_id, bc.owner_id, bc.created_ts, bc.closed_ts
  FROM base_cases bc
  LEFT JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = bc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.owner_assignment_count, 0) <= 1
), per_agent AS (
  SELECT owner_id,
         COUNT(*) AS case_count,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_ts - created_ts))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred_cases
  GROUP BY owner_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT owner_id AS "Id"
FROM per_agent
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;
